sourceMovie.title: The Naked Gun
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Naked Gun works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: 22 Jump Street
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Naked Gun clicked for you, 22 Jump Street (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die

faq.question: What should I watch after The Naked Gun?
faq.answer: Try 22 Jump Street, Bad Boys: Ride or Die, Hitman's Wife's Bodyguard—each shares DNA with The Naked Gun while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Naked Gun?
faq.answer: The Naked Gun (2025) is best described as Action, Comedy, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Naked Gun worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
